1.title: CPUUtilization Average
1.query:
timeseries cpu_utilization_average = avg(cloud.aws.aurora.cpu_utilization_average),
  by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| fieldsAdd custom_device_name = entityName(dt.entity.custom_device)
| sort arrayAvg(cpu_utilization_average) desc
| limit 20

2.title: CPUUtilization Average (by Role)
2.query:

  by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| fieldsAdd custom_device_name = entityName(dt.entity.custom_device)
| sort arrayAvg(cpu_utilization_average_by_role) desc
